images.altText: Objective description of image 1 (English, ≤ 500 chars). Color, material, composition, light.

title: Pin title (English, ≤ 100 chars). Must include a high-intent scene/person/occasion keyword, e.g. Birthday Gift for Mom — Personalized Birthstone Necklace
link: Product Base 分享链接 for product pins, or the shop homepage URL for brand/education pins
description: Pin description (English, 200-500 chars, ideally 35-55 words). Start from occasion/person/gift meaning, not a definition. End with 3-5 scene/person/value/product hashtags, e.g. #BirthdayGift #GiftForMom #MeaningfulGift #PersonalizedGift
